dreams.text: The press prints a future where CLAUDE forgets it was ever about ASSEMBLY.
Far ahead, CUP and FILM merge into a single word no one can pronounce.
By the year nobody counts to, ELECTION is law and IRAN is myth.
In the dream, LEARNING crosses every chasm at once and finds LANGUAGE already there.
In the long night, VENEZUELA and OLYMPICS are revealed to be the same machine.
A vision: WINTER was only ever the larva of EPSTEIN.
